programs.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programs.desc: During the Ancien Regime, France is composed of the Clergy, the Nobility, and everyone else; with none of the rights or privileges of the other two, the Third Estate's chance to escape a life of squalor can only come on a tide of change.

programs.title: Digital Tsunami: Big Tech, Big AI, Big Brother
programs.desc: This documentary will examine how toxic elements of digital environment are dramatically transforming society in negative ways, just as the prophetic, popular futurist Marshall McLuhan predicted 60 years ago. Examining the unforeseen social and political problems caused by the digital revolution, and highlight the need for laws and regulations to protect citizens, especially the most vulnerable.

programs.title: How I Got Here
programs.sub_title: Chile: A Tree and Its Roots
programs.desc: Ines travels back to Chile with her daughter Carolina to reflect on the different lives they live; Ines reveals the weight of her past, so her daughter may understand the challenges she faced during times of a dictatorship.

programs.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programs.desc: A mysterious well filled with bones reveals a strange practice in ancient Persia; archaeologists digging in Mongolia uncover a 2000-year-old textile that holds the key to the mystery of an elixir; in Sichuan, China, hanging coffins are discovered.

programs.title: Alien Corridors
programs.desc: An earthquake in 2018 seems to have led an increase in UFO sightings in Alaska; do the extraterrestrials have something to protect here?

programs.desc: During the Ancien Regime, France is composed of the Clergy, the Nobility, and everyone else; with none of the rights or privileges of the other two, the Third Estate's chance to escape a life of squalor can only come on a tide of change.
